title: Senior Teacher - Meritnation Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Meritnation Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Meritnation Ventures Solutions in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Meritnation Ventures Solutions:
Meritnation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation Ventures Solutions!
